coverage: 100% of reachable node types; the browser evaluates all 1,007 nodes in the root closure.
validation: Four Blender/VM cases cover authored settings, wrapper switching, thickness, and wrapper dimensions. Edge Vertices now resolves endpoint positions on the point domain instead of misreading endpoint IDs as edge IDs, reducing the three-pass sharpen edge-length median from 7.346 to 0.278 versus Blender's 0.279 and aligning the sharpened shell bounds within 0.03 units. Final authored output is 62,109 / 53,890 versus Blender's 61,812 / 53,892: only two faces short and 0.48% high in vertices. The remaining final +Z difference is 0.478 units and begins outside the corrected sharpen field.
